description_long: This is a compact, modern two-seater sofa with a sleek, minimalist design. The upholstery appears to be a smooth, matte black leather or faux leather, giving it a sophisticated and urban look. The sofa features two individual seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be loose but well-fitted. The armrests are straight, moderately padded, and rise to the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy silhouette. The legs are slim, straight, and black, positioned at each corner, slightly elevating the sofa off the ground. The overall construction suggests a sturdy wooden or metal frame beneath the upholstery, with foam or similar material providing cushioning.
description: A modern, compact black two-seater sofa with straight armrests, uniform cushions, and slim black legs. The upholstery is smooth and matte, giving it a sleek urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing two uniform seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's overall boxy silhouette.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, padded armrest and the slim, straight leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest with two back cushions and the sofa's clean, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the straight armrest and slim leg, emphasizing the sofa's symmetrical design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two loose, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all individually placed and well-fitted.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at seat height, moderately padded, with no decorative elements or material contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, straight black legs positioned at each corner, slightly elevating the sofa, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two loose, uniform back cushions and a continuous, unadorned structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
